name: System or mechanic suggestion
about: Propose a new system, mechanic, or causal chain to add to the design

labels: system-suggestion

## What system or mechanic are you proposing?

<!-- Brief one-line summary, then expand. -->

## What problem does it solve / what does it enable?

<!-- Why is this needed? What gap does it fill? Which existing system does it support or extend? -->

## Inputs and outputs (sketch)

<!-- If it's a system note: what triggers it? What does it trigger?
     If it's a chain note: what's the sequence of cause and effect?

     Wikilinks to other systems are fine: [[bear-ai]], [[scent-system]], etc. -->

## Player-readable signals

<!-- Per the diegetic-UI commitment: how does the player perceive this in-world?
     What visible/audible signals are observable? No UI alerts allowed. -->

## How does this honor the foundational principles?

<!-- Specifically:
     - Does it create variance with readable signals (§2)?
     - Does its behavior emerge mechanically, not from scripted narrative (§2)?
     - Does it avoid creating a dominant strategy (§1)?
     - Does it respect the diegetic-UI commitment (§12.8, §14.13)? -->

## What's deliberately NOT in scope?

<!-- Honesty about edges. What did you choose not to include and why? -->
